# A function to remove accented characters from all the character values of a data frame

A function to remove accented characters from all the character values
of a data frame

## Usage

``` r
correct_accent(data, pattern = "[Ã©]", replacement = "e")
```

## Arguments

- data:

  Dataframe, usually the DHIS2 immunization dataframe

- pattern:

  A character value to match or a regular expression. Default "Ã©\|Ã©"

- replacement:

  A character value to replace the pattern. Default "e"

## Value

A dataframe with values corrected

## Examples

``` r
datafile <- system.file(c("vacc_data.RDS"), package = "pevrdc")

vacc <- readRDS(datafile)
correct_accent(vacc, pattern =  "[\u00C3\u00A9]", replacement = "e")
```
